variables.input:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { status = parsed[resultType] }
| fields status

fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { eventType = parsed[properties][incidentType] }
| fields eventType

fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { region = parsed[properties][region] }
| fields region

fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { service = parsed[properties][service] }
| fields service

0.title: Active Issues
0.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[resultType] == "Active"
| summarize activeCount = count()

1.title: Events by Status
1.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd eventType = parsed[properties][incidentType], region = parsed[properties][region], service = parsed[properties][service]
| filter in(eventType, array($EventType))
| filter in(region, array($Region))
| filter in(service, array($Service))
| summarize count = count(), by: { status = parsed[resultType] }

2.title: Events by Type
2.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], region = parsed[properties][region], service = parsed[properties][service]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(region, array($Region))
| filter in(service, array($Service))
| summarize count = count(), by: { eventType = parsed[properties][incidentType] }

3.title: Event Summary with Azure Portal Links
3.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd
    title = parsed[properties][title],
    service = parsed[properties][service],
    region = parsed[properties][region],
    eventType = parsed[properties][incidentType],
    status = parsed[resultType],
    stage = parsed[properties][stage],
    trackingId = parsed[properties][trackingId],
    isHIR = parsed[properties][isHIR],
    impactType = parsed[properties][impactType],
    impactStart = parsed[properties][impactStartTime],
    impactEnd = parsed[properties][impactMitigationTime],
    eventTime = parsed[time]
| fieldsRemove parsed, content
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(eventType, array($EventType))
| filter in(region, array($Region))
| filter in(service, array($Service))
| fieldsRemove dt.auth.origin, dt.openpipeline.source, dt.openpipeline.pipelines, event.type, cloud.provider
| sort eventTime desc

4.title: Events by Service
4.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], eventType = parsed[properties][incidentType], region = parsed[properties][region]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(eventType, array($EventType))
| filter in(region, array($Region))
| summarize count = count(), by: { service = parsed[properties][service] }
| sort count desc

5.title: Events by Region
5.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], eventType = parsed[properties][incidentType], service = parsed[properties][service]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(eventType, array($EventType))
| filter in(service, array($Service))
| summarize count = count(), by: { region = parsed[properties][region] }
| sort count desc
| limit 10

6.title: Timeline of Events
6.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], region = parsed[properties][region], service = parsed[properties][service]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(region, array($Region))
| filter in(service, array($Service))
| summarize count = count(), by: { timeframe = bin(timestamp, 1h), eventType = parsed[properties][incidentType] }

7.title: Total Events
7.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize totalCount = count()

8.title: Resolved
8.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[resultType] == "Resolved"
| summarize resolvedCount = count()

9.title: Incidents
9.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][incidentType] == "Incident"
| summarize incidentCount = count()

10.title: Maintenance
10.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][incidentType] == "Maintenance"
| summarize maintenanceCount = count()

11.title: Event Details with Impacted Resources Link
11.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd
    title = parsed[properties][title],
    trackingId = parsed[properties][trackingId],
    status = parsed[resultType],
    stage = parsed[properties][stage],
    impactStart = parsed[properties][impactStartTime],
    impactEnd = parsed[properties][impactMitigationTime],
    maintenanceType = parsed[properties][maintenanceType],
    sensitive = parsed[properties][sensitive],
    impactedServices = parsed[properties][impactedServices]
| fieldsRemove parsed, content
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| fields title, trackingId, status, stage, impactStart, impactEnd, maintenanceType, sensitive, impactedServices
| sort impactStart desc

12.title: High Impact (HIR)
12.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][isHIR] == true
| summarize hirCount = count()

13.title: Sensitive Events
13.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][sensitive] == true
| summarize sensitiveCount = count()

14.title: Events by Impact Type
14.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], eventType = parsed[properties][incidentType], region = parsed[properties][region], service = parsed[properties][service]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(eventType, array($EventType))
| filter in(region, array($Region))
| filter in(service, array($Service))
| summarize count = count(), by: { impactType = parsed[properties][impactType] }
| sort count desc

15.title: Correlated Entities
15.query:
fetch events
| filter event.kind == "AVAILABILITY_EVENT" or event.kind == "CUSTOM_INFO"
| filter startsWith(event.name, "Azure:")
| summarize impactedEntities = countDistinct(dt.source_entity)

16.title: Active Health Events by Region
16.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[resultType] == "Active"
| fieldsAdd 
    region = parsed[properties][region],
    service = parsed[properties][service],
    trackingId = parsed[properties][trackingId],
    title = parsed[properties][title]
| summarize 
    healthEvents = collectDistinct(title),
    services = collectDistinct(service),
    by: { region }

17.title: Correlated Azure VMs
17.query:
fetch events
| filter event.kind == "AVAILABILITY_EVENT" or event.kind == "CUSTOM_INFO"
| filter startsWith(event.name, "Azure:")
| fieldsAdd healthTitle = event.name, entityId = dt.source_entity
| summarize alertCount = count(), alerts = collectDistinct(healthTitle), by: { entityId }
| sort alertCount desc
| limit 100

18.title: Problems During Health Events
18.query:
fetch events
| filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM"
| fieldsAdd timeWindow = bin(timestamp, 4h), problemTitle = event.name, problemStatus = event.status
| lookup [
    fetch logs
    | filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
    | parse content, "JSON:parsed"
    | filter parsed[resultType] == "Active" or parsed[resultType] == "Resolved"
    | fieldsAdd timeWindow = bin(timestamp, 4h), healthTitle = parsed[properties][title], healthRegion = parsed[properties][region], healthService = parsed[properties][service]
    | summarize healthEvents = collectDistinct(healthTitle), regions = collectDistinct(healthRegion), services = collectDistinct(healthService), by: { timeWindow }
], sourceField: timeWindow, lookupField: timeWindow, fields: { healthEvents, regions, services }
| filter isNotNull(healthEvents)
| fields timestamp, problemTitle, problemStatus, healthEvents, regions, services
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 50

19.title: Azure Health vs Dynatrace Problems Timeline
19.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd eventType = "Azure Health"
| summarize healthEventCount = count(), by: { timeframe = bin(timestamp, 4h), eventType }
| append [
    fetch events
    | filter event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM"
    | fieldsAdd eventType = "Dynatrace Problem"
    | summarize problemCount = count(), by: { timeframe = bin(timestamp, 4h), eventType }
]
| fieldsAdd count = coalesce(healthEventCount, problemCount)

20.title: Correlation Events Detail
20.query:
fetch events
| filter event.kind == "AVAILABILITY_EVENT" or event.kind == "CUSTOM_INFO"
| filter startsWith(event.name, "Azure:")
| fields timestamp, event.name, event.kind, dt.source_entity
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 100

21.title: Entity Correlation
21.content:
## Entity Correlation

This section shows Dynatrace-monitored entities that may be affected by active Azure Service Health events. Correlation is based on matching Azure regions with Dynatrace entity cloud regions.

**Tip:** Enable the correlation workflow to automatically attach Azure health events to impacted entities for Davis AI correlation.

22.title: Regions Affected
22.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ServiceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[resultType] == "Active"
| summarize activeRegions = countDistinct(parsed[properties][region])
